calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Reasonable Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-10-2015 Off Calendar

Re-Notice Of Petitioner Felix Chans Motion For Reasonable Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-10-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Cross-Petition By Adaptive Medias, Inc. To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DAVID A. LOWE and MICHELLE G. LEE of Rudy Exelrod Zieff & Lowe LLP, Tel. No. (415) 434-9800 appearing for the Petitioner;
Atty. DAVID R. FISHER of Fisher & Wolfe LLP, Tel No. (310) 278-4300 appearing for the Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to RESPONDENT ADAPTIVE MEDIAS, INC. FORMELY KNOWN AS MIMVI, INC'S Cross-Petition By Adaptive Medias, Inc. To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award, the motion to confirm the arbitration award is granted and the motion to vacate is denied as moot. AM did not show that the arbitrator failed to timely disclose a ground for disqualification of which the arbitrator was then aware. (See CCP 1286.2(6).) Moreover, the alleged relationship was too attenuated to require a disclosure even had the arbitrator been aware of it. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PETITIONER MUST RESUBMIT PROPOSED JUDGMENT AFTER CALCULATING PROPOSED POST-ARBITRATION INTEREST AND TOTAL. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition By Felix Chan To Confirm Final Arbitration Decision
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DAVID A. LOWE and MICHELLE G. LEE of Rudy Exelrod Zieff & Lowe LLP, Tel. No. (415) 434-9800 appearing for the Petitioner;
Atty. DAVID R. FISHER of Fisher & Wolfe LLP, Tel No. (310) 278-4300 appearing for the Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to PETITIONER FELIX CHAN'S Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Decision, the motion to confirm the arbitration award is granted and the motion to vacate is denied as moot. AM did not show that the arbitrator failed to timely disclose a ground for disqualification of which the arbitrator was then aware. (See CCP 1286.2(6).) Moreover, the alleged relationship was too attenuated to require a disclosure even had the arbitrator been aware of it. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PETITIONER MUST RESUBMIT PROPOSED JUDGMENT AFTER CALCULATING PROPOSED POST-ARBITRATION INTEREST AND TOTAL. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition By Felix Chan To Confirm Final Arbitration Decision
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Continued To Apr-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
